---
title: "How to write a classVars.csv"
---

The parameters defined in a classVars.csv XXXXXXXX Click on the link below to start the shinyApp that will help you define the parameters for your run.

**Remember to download your work from the PREVIEW TAB before closing the shinyApp**

-   **Start building a new classVars.csv**\
    [Open App](https://computationalecologylab.shinyapps.io/runVars/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
